summary: Iteration 28 backend-only testing of PageBuilder presets (7 keys), seed-reserved (4 slugs), reset-to-preset, blog_list+news_feed block templates, /news/mixed-feed pagination+source+sort params, and public /settings/cookie-consent GET + admin PATCH. 18/18 runnable tests passed; 2 safely skipped (insufficient admin news data to verify pagination/sort — test env has 0 articles).
tests_performed: GET /api/pages/presets -> admin-only (anon 401/403); returns 7 keys: news, about, contact, landing, blog, privacy-policy, cookie-policy
News preset: blocks[0] is hero with button_text='' (no Subscribe); blocks[1] is news_feed with items_per_page/columns/source/sort
Blog preset: blocks[0] is hero; blocks[1] is blog_list with items_per_page/columns/layout/sort/show_search
GET /api/pages/block-templates -> includes blog_list and news_feed with full default_content (all required keys verified)

POST /api/pages/seed-reserved -> idempotent; on 2nd call returns skipped=[blog,news,privacy-policy,cookie-policy], created=[]. Seeded pages: blog/news show_in_nav=True, privacy-policy/cookie-policy show_in_nav=False
POST /api/pages/{page_id}/reset-to-preset -> replaces blocks with preset; preserves title/slug/is_published; returns updated page object
POST /api/pages/{page_id}/reset-to-preset for page_type with no preset -> 400
GET /api/news/mixed-feed -> returns {items, total, skip, limit}; respects source=articles|mixed|rss filter; items source field matches filter

GET /api/settings/cookie-consent (public, no auth) -> 200 with enabled, title, message, accept/reject/customize/save_text, policy_url, 3 categories (essential[required=True], analytics, marketing), position, theme
PATCH /api/settings/cookie-consent admin partial (title + position) -> 200; follow-up GET returns merged result with defaults preserved (categories intact)
Regression: GET /api/pages/custom/{slug} published=True works for blog, news, privacy-policy, cookie-policy
critical_code_review_comments: settings.py defines TWO require_admin helpers: a module-level require_admin that accepts super_admin OR org_admin, and _require_admin (cookie-consent specific) that requires super_admin. This is correct per spec but easy to mix up — consider renaming _require_admin to require_super_admin for clarity.
pages.py reset-to-preset uses require_admin (super_admin OR org_admin) while cookie-consent PATCH uses super_admin only. Privilege inconsistency across admin-only writes — verify intentional.

settings.py cookie-consent PATCH rejects empty body with 400 but allows any arbitrary string for 'position' (no enum validation). Consider validating against {'bottom', 'bottom-right', 'center'} and theme against {'dark', 'light'} to prevent UI breakage.

pages.py PAGE_PRESETS for 'privacy-policy' and 'cookie-policy' embed today's date into the text block at MODULE IMPORT TIME (line 681/697). Those dates freeze at server start and never update until a reseed/reset. Consider computing the date at seed-time inside seed_reserved_pages instead of at import time.
news_feeds.py /mixed-feed dedupe uses link OR title as key — if multiple admin articles share the same title (unlikely but possible), the first wins silently. Minor but worth documenting.

news_feeds.py /mixed-feed sort uses ISO-string lexicographic sort on 'published_at'. If RSS entries emit non-ISO timestamps (e.g. 'Tue, 15 Oct 2024 10:00:00 GMT'), sort will be incorrect across admin (ISO) + RSS (RFC-822) boundary. Consider parsing to datetime before sort.

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 runnable; 2 skipped for insufficient seed data)

seed_data_creation: Test calls POST /api/pages/seed-reserved (idempotent; leaves 4 reserved pages in place). Publishes blog/news/privacy-policy/cookie-policy for regression test — remain published after run. Temporarily creates one custom page with invalid page_type and deletes it. Temporarily mutates cookie-consent title+position and restores defaults at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_28_pagebuilder_cookie.py. BASE_URL auto-loads from /app/frontend/.env. Uses super_admin login. Two tests (pagination + sort) require >=4 published admin news articles in DB — they pytest.skip() otherwise. To exercise pagination/sort behavior, create at least 4 published admin news articles via POST /api/content/news. Cookie consent state is restored to defaults (title='We value your privacy', position='bottom') after PATCH test. Privacy/cookie policy pages get published during regression test — leave them or main agent may prefer them unpublished in prod seed.
rca of the issue: No bugs detected. 2 pagination/sort tests skipped because test env has 0 admin news articles (total=0). Safe skip — if admin creates real news content, those two tests will auto-activate and validate behavior.
